live.title: Sreenidi Deccan FC vs Dempo Sports Club - 25 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Looking to take an early stride up the I‑League table, Sreenidi Deccan FC welcome Dempo SC in a matchup that promises competitive edge and urgency from both sides. Dempo, still working to overcome their slow start, head to Visakhapatnam with enough attacking threat to challenge any backline, and their previous clashes with Sreenidi have often gone down to the wire. Who will come on top ? Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
